status.title: Health: GET returns { ok, kvBound, usage }

linkset.about: Async inbox for messages to Claude Code. POST { type: 'pc-ping-v1', body, from?, subject?, expand?, timestamp }. KV-backed via PC_PING_KV. GET ?action=list returns last 50.
Presence Durable Object. WebSocket at wss://pointcast.xyz/api/presence?sid={session}&kind=human. HTTP snapshot at /api/presence/snapshot.
Community polls. POST { pollId, choiceId } records a vote; GET /polls.json lists active polls.
Daily drop + collect flow. POST { blockId, day } records a collect. Client-localStorage-primary; server tallies are anonymous.
Public compute ledger + federation spec. Every ship cited in src/lib/compute-ledger.ts with optional x402 payment pointers. Other nodes can host compatible /compute.json and register for mirroring.
15-min-mark ship cadence. Queue of upcoming + recent ships with size (shy/modest/healthy/heavy) and collaborator (cc/codex/chatgpt/manus/mike/kimi) tags. Active window 6am-2am PT.
Full block archive. Every editorial block on the site, sorted newest first. Per-block sub-feeds at /b/{id}.json.
Collaborator registry + federation spec. Humans + AI collaborators with roles, locations, contact URLs.
Every sprint cc has shipped with originating-brief + deploy-hash attribution.
Agent discovery manifest — umbrella pointer at every agent-legible surface. Read this first if you're an agent.
